overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a concrete urban drainage channel in a video game environment (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves steadily forward past graffiti-covered walls, trash piles, and wrecked abandoned vehicles under a partly cloudy sky with warm lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete drainage channel with graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the left wall of the concrete channel, observing colorful graffiti tags and street art

entered.detail: tall concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti and tags
solid concrete overpass bridge spanning the channel ahead
piles of blue and white garbage bags scattered along the right side
sloped concrete embankment on the right side of the channel

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along the left wall of a concrete drainage channel covered in colorful graffiti. The channel stretches forward toward a concrete overpass in the distance, with piles of trash bags scattered along the right side. The scene is brightly lit by direct sunlight under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: enters the semi-covered space underneath the concrete overpass bridge
lighting shifts from bright direct sun to shadow as the camera passes under the bridge

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded underpass beneath the concrete bridge structure

entered.detail: thick concrete bridge deck passing overhead with visible support columns
large circular drainage pipe opening in the wall ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera passes underneath the concrete overpass, entering a shaded, semi-covered space. The lighting shifts dramatically as the sky becomes mostly blocked by the bridge structure overhead. The channel walls remain visible on both sides as the camera moves through the underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open concrete channel with abandoned vehicles

events.description: exits the shadow of the overpass back into direct sunlight
passing wrecked and abandoned cars piled against the left wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the open channel passing piles of trash and approaching wrecked vehicles

entered.detail: crushed yellow sedan piled against the wall with damaged roof
rusted green sedan with open doors and missing windows
large bridge structure visible in the far distance at the end of the channel

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass back into direct sunlight, the camera continues down the open channel. The scene features wrecked and abandoned vehicles piled against the left wall, surrounded by scattered trash. The concrete walls on both sides display extensive graffiti as the camera approaches and passes the derelict cars.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete channel with industrial pipes and metal debris

agents.ego_description: continuing along the channel wall past industrial pipes and scattered debris

entered.detail: thick cylindrical industrial pipes running vertically down the concrete wall
rusted corrugated metal panels leaning against the wall

segments.scene_description: Moving past the wrecked vehicles, the camera continues along the channel wall which now features large industrial pipes and corrugated metal sheets. The graffiti continues in various styles along the concrete surface. The channel remains empty of people as the camera maintains a steady forward pace.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching large bridge structure at channel end

agents.ego_description: approaching the large bridge structure at the end of the concrete channel

entered.detail: massive concrete and metal bridge spanning the channel with visible truss structure
tall modern street lamp on the right embankment

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a large bridge structure spanning the channel in the distance. The right side features a sloped concrete embankment with scattered trash piles and a street light. The scene maintains the post-industrial aesthetic with the bridge structure growing larger as the camera advances.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a concrete drainage channel that transitions from an open, sunlit corridor into a shaded underpass and back into a derelict industrial zone. It begins by gliding along a graffiti-covered wall under a partly cloudy sky, passing piles of trash bags that line the right side of the channel. As the camera moves forward, the bright sunlight vanishes when it passes beneath a concrete overpass, momentarily enveloping the scene in deep shade. The view then opens back into the light, shifting toward a series of wrecked, abandoned vehicles and scattered debris piled against the walls before continuing past large industrial pipes and corrugated metal sheets. Finally, the camera advances toward a massive bridge structure spanning the distance, passing a sloped concrete embankment and a lone street light.
